label: Bug fixes
items: Push notifications now respect 'Not yet → N days' snoozes — a snoozed harvest task no longer triggers a reminder until its new check-in date arrives.

Weekly Monday email no longer arrives twice for members of multiple homes. By default you'll get one combined email with a section per home; switch to 'one email per home' in Account → Alerts if you preferred the old behaviour.

label: Improvements
items: Weekly email redesigned: weather strip now shows every day at a glance (vertical layout fits on mobile), each task is a tappable link to the right day on the Calendar.

Notification preferences now sync to your account — toggling Watering / Harvest / Pruning / Golden hour / Weekly overview / Optimise digest now silences the matching push or email on the server side, not just in the app.
